characters.name: Alejandro Possum
characters.description: Alejandro PossumOccupationStudentPhysical descriptionSpeciesPossumGenderMaleAppearancesPortrayed bySergio Di ZioAppears inThe Amazing Expandable Clubhouse(cameo)The Town PicnicThe Tomato DropFeathers(cameo)One of These Goats(cameo)Colorful and Tasty(cameo)Make Music NaturallyThinking About BlinkingBaby Steps(cameo)Litterbug(cameo)DebutThe Town Picnic Alejandro Possumis a young possum boy inElinor's class. He is introduced inThe Town Picnic, where he is very hungry and struggles to get ketchup out of a bottle. Alejandro is shown to be proficient at skating, as displayed in his minor appearance inBaby Steps. Alejandro has slightly gray fur, with dark fur on his hands and feet. He has gray fur, or possibly hair, on his head. Alejandro also has a short, pink tail that he can hang from, briefly shown inThinking About Blinking.

characters.name: Ari Bat
characters.description: That issocool! Ari BatNormalPre-releaseAliasesArnold (Mr. Antelope)RelativesMrs. Bat(mother)Mr. Bat(father)Miri Bat(baby sister)Unnamed grandpaUnnamed grandmaLulu (aunt)Norma (aunt)CousinOther cousinsOccupationStudent, ExplorerPhysical descriptionSpeciesFruit batGenderMaleHeight35"Eye colorBlackAppearancesPortrayed byWyatt White(Season 1)Athan Giazitzidis(Season 2)Appears inEvery episode,except:Burrowing Owl GirlStrawberry JamLeaf CharmsSlime TimeBlackout!DebutThe Amazing Expandable Clubhouse Ari Bat[1]is one of the protagonists ofElinor Wonders Why. He is a young fruit bat and is close friends withElinorandOlive, attendingMs. Mole's Schooland exploring nature with them. He also acts as the comic relief of the trio, with his jokes and clumsiness often unintentionally helping discover the mysteries of nature. Ari is very silly and energetic, often making jokes and being quick to act throughout the show. His playful personality often introduces a lot of creative ideas for the group and can always provide a sense of fun alongside curiosity. His clumsiness also plays a role with his silliness, as often he falls over, trips, and fumbles with things numerous times within the series. Ari's expressive personality is also shown with his recreational talents, as he can play the drums and cymbals, and can play baseball, even making a home run! As seen inBath Time, Ari is prone to getting dirty very quickly, and he also enjoys getting dirty to a certain extent. Alongside his joking personality, he is very caring, and often shows a lot of heart and care for his friends, family, and the environment around them. As an explorer, he makes sure to be very cautious and observant towards the plants and animals; observing from a distance, taking care of them, and respecting their natural habitat. Though he can often get caught up with a game or trend while in nature, he's quick to learn after pointing out his mistakes. As the older brother, Ari is also often shown taking care of his baby sister,Miri, playing games with her and teaching her new things, such as waving hi and tossing a ball.[2]Even when he is discouraged by his parents focusing on Miri more, Ari openly calls her "awesome" and holds no ill will towards his baby sister nor his parents.[3]Finally, he is quick to protect his friends and others from dangers, even if it means putting himself in the fray. For example, inThe Town PicnicandA Moth Mystery, he was quick to protectOlivefrom falling honey and moths, respectively, while swatting the latter. While his cautiousness can help him be protective, he can get scared easily, such as when being clumsy and falling, or when encountering awitch.[4]This behavior is also shown with his bird plushie,Robin, where he loves playing with him and even takes him toHidden LakeinA Wonderful Journey. Ari is very voracious, often expressing interest in talking about and eating food. For example, inColorful and Tasty, he strategically asksMr. Rabbitto sample various batches of

characters.name: Ari's Cousin
characters.description: Ari's CousinRelativesAri Bat(Cousin)Miri Bat(Cousin)Mr. Bat(Uncle or Marital-Uncle)Mrs. Bat(Aunt or Marital-Aunt)Physical descriptionSpeciesFruit batGenderFemaleAppearancesPortrayed byRuby McGurrinAppears inAri's CousinElinor's Circus(cameo)Spice Is Nice(cameo)DebutAri's Cousin This page is for the character related toAri Bat. Did you mean theunaired episode of the same name?Ari's Cousinis a character who was supposed to be introduced inAri's Cousin, an unaired episode ofElinor Wonders Why. Ari's Cousin looks incredibly similar to Ari, both being bats with light-brown fur across her body. She uniquely has wavy brown hair unlike Ari andhis mom. She lacks the separation between lighter and darker fur on her head that Ari has. She is slightly larger than Ari.

characters.name: Beatriz
characters.description: BeatrizAdultYoungOccupationInventorPhysical descriptionSpeciesCoatiGenderFemaleAppearancesPortrayed byTamara Freeman(Dialogue)Nisa Gunduz(Songs)Appears inA Wonderful JourneyDebutA Wonderful Journey Beatrizis an inventor introduced inA Wonderful Journey. She is a long-time friend ofRanger Rabbit, who was once her babysitter, and had only seenElinorwhen she was just a baby. Beatriz shares many personality traits with Elinor, as she enjoys exploring, making observations, and she invents things using Nature as inspiration. She is also friendly and enthusiastic likeAri, eager to make observations, and likeOlive, draws her findings in a notebook. Beatriz is possibly of Spanish descent, as she sometimes uses Spanish in her sentences. Beatriz shares many personality traits with Elinor, as she enjoys exploring, making observations, and she invents things using Nature as inspiration. She is also friendly and enthusiastic likeAri, eager to make observations, and likeOlive, draws her findings in a notebook. Beatriz is possibly of Spanish descent, as she sometimes uses Spanish in her sentences.

characters.name: Bodie Hippo
characters.description: Bodie HippoNormalWinterRelativesMr. Hippo(father)Mrs. Hippo(mother)Physical descriptionSpeciesHippopotamusGenderMaleAppearancesPortrayed byTBAAppears inThe Science of Staying WarmMs. Mole's Glasses(cameo)Snow FriendColorful and Tasty(cameo)The Syrup Tree(cameo)Butterfly Babies(cameo)Elinor's CircusFrozen FishJust PeachyDebutThe Science of Staying WarmBodie Hippois a young hippo boy who first appears inThe Science of Staying Warm. He is one of the non-furry animals who needs lots of protection against the cold. Bodie has gray skin with darker gray nails. He has a large nose and small, round ears. Bodie usually wears a yellow shirt with cyan stripes, dark blue shorts, and a red/cyan propeller hat. In colder weather, he wears a thick, yellow snowsuit and helmet, also with a propeller. He also has white gloves and purple snow shoes.

He also has white gloves and purple snow shoes.

characters.name: Cai Lun
characters.description: Cai Lunis a historical figure in one ofTapir's songs about the invention of paper based on wasps, which appears afterThe Paper Trail. He's depicted as a giant panda bear. characters.description: CamillaRelativesMs. Dromedary(mother)OccupationStudentPhysical descriptionSpeciesDromedary CamelGenderFemaleEye colorBlackAppearancesPortrayed byNorah AdamsAppears inThe Amazing Expandable ClubhouseThe Town Picnic(cameo)Hiding in Plain SightThe Seed of an IdeaThe Tomato DropFeathers(cameo)Ms. Mole's Glasses(cameo)Speed RacerOne of These Goats(cameo)The Pokey Plant(cameo)Bath TimeAri's Lucky ShirtThinking About BlinkingElinor's Circus(cameo)Zig Zag PlantButterfly DrinksFollow Your Nose(cameo)Leaf CharmsRocky the RockElinor's Fishy Friend(cameo)A Wonderful JourneySlime TimeDebutThe Amazing Expandable ClubhouseCamillais a student female dromedary camel with royal and unique likes. She recurring classmate ofElinorand has made several appearances in episodes.Her motheralong with her house first appeared inLeaf Charms. The Amazing Expandable ClubhouseThe Town Picnic(cameo)Hiding in Plain SightThe Seed of an IdeaThe Tomato DropFeathers(cameo)Ms. Mole's Glasses(cameo)Speed RacerOne of These Goats(cameo)The Pokey Plant(cameo)Bath TimeAri's Lucky ShirtThinking About BlinkingElinor's Circus(cameo)Zig Zag PlantButterfly DrinksFollow Your Nose(cameo)Leaf CharmsRocky the RockElinor's Fishy Friend(cameo)A Wonderful JourneySlime Time Camilla seems to be cocky and a bit smug, but she is also outgoing and can be a great friend to anyone. She loves that things are unique and special or as she usually calls them "Flair" and everything that has to do with royalty, that is why her room is decorated like a castle, in addition to that she has a lot of bracelets , crowns and jewelry to look like a queen. She also doesn't bother to show off her things like the car they gave her on her birthday. SinceLeaf Charmsbegan to have a great fascination for leaves. characters.description: Chickyis a chickadee who appears inFeed the Birds. She is Elinor's "favorite chickadee bird friend"..

characters.name: Elinor Rabbit
characters.description: "Just listen and see, come and wonder with me!" Elinor RabbitNormalPilotPre-releaseRelativesRanger Rabbit(mother)Mr. Rabbit(father)Baba Rabbit(paternal grandfather)Bibi Rabbit(paternal grandmother)OccupationExplorer, Student, Junior Forest RangerBiographical informationAge5[1]Physical descriptionSpeciesRabbitGenderFemaleHeight3'1'' (approximately)[2]AppearancesPortrayed byMarkeda McKay(Original)Unknown (pre-release pilot)  Logan Simones (Tonies)Appears inEvery episodeDebutThe Amazing Expandable ClubhouseElinor Rabbitis a young girl who lives inAnimal Townand main protagonist ofElinor Wonders Why. She is voiced byMarkeda McKay. Unknown (pre-release pilot)  Logan Simones (Tonies) Elinor is the most curious and observant character in the series. In each episode, Elinor models the foundational practices of science inquiry and engineering design, including her amazing powers of observation and willingness to ask questions and investigate. When she encounters something she doesn’t understand, like why birds have feathers or how tiny ants build massive anthills, she just can’t let it go until she figures it out. And in discovering the answers, Elinor often learns something about nature’s ingenious inventions and how they can connect to ideas in our designed world, and what it takes to live in a community. She loves carrots and mentions that she loves carrot sticks but has a distaste in raisins inElinor Stops the Squish. As said inWind in the Web, Elinor also loves cheese. For dinner, Backyard Soup is her favorite, as stated inthe eponymous episode. Elinor is generous, cheerful, kind-hearted, and a good friend to her family and friends. But despite her strong enthusiasm and tending to look on the bright side, Elinor can become very downtrodden. She is saddened by the loss of her voice and the potential cancellation of her song inNo Need to Shout. She's also driven to near tears over her supposed failure to protect the forest inJunior Ranger Elinor, and even attempts to willingly give up her Junior Ranger title as a result. However, in both these scenarios, she bounces back pretty quickly, returning to her curious self in no time.

characters.name: Exploring Club
characters.description: TheExploring Club(mistakenly referred as theExplorer's Clubin the TV guide) also abbreviated as justClubis what Sally Beaver and numerous other characters join inThe Amazing Expandable Clubhouse. It was presumably founded by Elinor, Ari and Olive, though the exact creation of the Club is not explained. They gather in theClubhouseand their mascots are two snails,NormaandLulu. These characters are only shown in a thought bubble Elinor has within The Amazing Expandable Clubhouse when she thinks about the possibility of even more kids joining the club. It's unknown if they ever will join the Exploring Club in the future. Additionally, the following characters show interest in joining the Exploring Club in acomic.

characters.name: Farmer Bear
characters.description: Farmer BearPhysical descriptionSpeciesBearGenderFemaleAppearancesPortrayed byEllen DublinAppears inThe Tomato DropThe Paper TrailThe Syrup TreeElinor's Circus(cameo)Litterbug(cameo)Just PeachyDebutThe Tomato DropFarmer Bearis a female grizzly bear (presumably) who is a recurring character inElinor Wonders Why. She is, as her title implies, a working farmer in the town. She is a female brown grizzly bear She wears a purplish lavender shirt with rolled up sleeves, a beige straw hat and dark gray overalls and has no shoes.

characters.name: Gael Lynx
characters.description: Gael LynxOccupationStudentPhysical descriptionSpeciesLynxGenderMaleAppearancesPortrayed byRoman PesinoAppears inThe Unsinkable LynxDebutThe Unsinkable Lynx Gael Lynx(pronounced GI-yel) is a young lynx and a friend ofElinor. He was introduced inThe Unsinkable Lynx, where it's told that he had recently moved toAnimal Townfrom "up North."[1] Gael is friendly. He seems to be a little competitive, as after being told byOliveto watch out forSilasdue to his speed, Gael made a beeline for him and tagged him before outrunning him right after, much to the amazement of the other kids. He's also very appreciative for Elinor and her friends for making him feel at home with a game of snow tag. Gael is friendly. He's also very appreciative for Elinor and her friends for making him feel at home with a game of snow tag.

characters.name: Gee Raffe
characters.description: Gee RaffeAliasesMs. Gee RaffeDeputy Gee RaffeOccupationDeputyPhysical descriptionSpeciesGiraffeGenderFemaleAppearancesPortrayed byKirsten AlterAppears inColorful and TastyWind in the WebThe Syrup TreeA Moth MysteryDebutColorful and Tasty Gee Raffe(also known asDeputy Gee RaffeorRanger Gee Raffe) is one ofRanger Rabbit's co-workers and a deputy inAnimal Town. Gee Raffe is a tall yellow giraffe that can often be seen in a tan deputy uniform, just like her co-deputy,Deputy Mouse.

characters.description: George de Mistralis a dog in Elinor Wonders Why. He is a Dog version of the real life person shown inSeed of an Idea. This is one of some media to talk about him. Georges de Mistralis how it is mispelled once in captions butGeorgewithout an S is used later byMs. Mole. characters.name: Goat twins
characters.description: Lizzie GoatMary GoatLizzie (left) and Mary (right)RelativesEach otherOccupationStudents, explorersPhysical descriptionSpeciesGoatGenderFemaleEye colorBlackAppearancesPortrayed byAbigail Oliver(Mary)Grace Oliver(Lizzie)Appears inThe Amazing Expandable ClubhouseHiding in Plain SightOwl Girl(cameo)The Science of Staying WarmLook What I Can DoFeathers(Lizzie only, cameo)No Need to Shout(Mary only)Elinor Stops the SquishSnow Friend(cameo)The Pokey PlantThe Syrup TreeMake Music Naturally(cameo)These SneezesAri's Lucky ShirtThinking About BlinkingElinor's CircusZig Zag Plant(cameo)Frozen FishDebutThe Amazing Expandable Clubhouse Grace Oliver(Lizzie) TheGoat twinsrefer to twin sisters namedMary GoatandLizzie Goat, who are nearly-identical monozygotic twin female white goats. They are recurring characters in the series. Like with most identical twins, it is difficult to distinguish who is whom at first glance. Mary and Lizzie are identical twins who are rarely seen apart. They are very girly and have a high social status in their class, as shown when they easily organize a game of hide and seek, which they are both very good at. Their reputation and leadership is rivaled by only that ofElinor,Ari, andOlive. Despite their popularity, they are fairly nice to their classmates, although they like to be mischievous with their identical appearances. Despite their many similarities, they also have a few differences. For example, Mary likes to dance and Lizzie really doesn’t.

characters.name: Hazel
characters.description: HazelRelativesMr. Lion(father)Physical descriptionSpeciesLionGenderFemaleAppearancesPortrayed bySvea Ham(Dialogue)Darby Butcher(Songs)Appears inA Garden For AllDebutA Garden For AllHazelis the daughter ofMr. Lionand appears in the episodeA Garden For All. Hazel is bright and cheery. She has a penchant for sweet things, whether they be smells or tastes. Because of this, she uses the word 'sweet' often. This affinity is strong enough to distract her from doing things, as she went off to smell strawberries inElinor'sgarden while she was playing catch with her andherfriends. Hazel has light yellow fur with short curly light brown mane. Hazel is bright and cheery. She has a penchant for sweet things, whether they be smells or tastes. Because of this, she uses the word 'sweet' often. This affinity is strong enough to distract her from doing things, as she went off to smell strawberries inElinor'sgarden while she was playing catch with her andherfriends.

Javier has brownish-gray fur with darker brown hair. He has a short tail and off-white antlers.
